item.title: My world as I know it is over
item.description:
My world ended on Tuesday. My best friend and partner passed away from an allergic reaction to contrast dye during a diagnostic MRI. A fucking MRI. This guy got hit with a farming tractor while in single digits, had literal feet of his colon removed due to diverticulitis, survived 20 years of alcoholism that started at age 12 then entered and remained in recovery for over 8 years, survived heart issues, and successfully controlled his to prediabetes over a year before this week. You guys knew him as OtterpawsMcChonk, imgur's honorary dad to usually non cis or heteronormative internet friends rejected by their families for being their genuine self. I introduced him to imgur after he had been in recovery for over a year and he loved you guys. We spent so much time here meme hunting and laughing at videos, and I just can't believe I'm never going to touch him again, or feel his hand rubbing my back as I go to sleep, or hear him laugh, or eat a meal he made because I asked. He taught me how to be a real person and not a collection of coping mechanisms and masks. We loved each other my entire adult life, and knew each other for 17 years. He loved to game, and made me feel validated for only playing a few titles but still loving them. He was a voracious reader and I know I will be trying to access his digital library eventually, he had good taste (see discworld tattoo). He loved music, and I already had 2 concerts set up for us next year. He joined a D&D party this year and was a certified dice goblin and according to his DM had found a huge amount of joy in the self expression allowed in game. He loved rom coms, especially Adam Sandler movies, but he also was down for any form of entertainment. He was a broken bird, physically and mentally, but he still has the kindest heart and the best outlook on life. Everybody loved him. He was the Andy to my April, and I don't know how to go on without him. He made me feel like we were the only two people in the world when I was overstimulated, and always put his daughter and mother first on big things but me on the day to day once she graduated high school and started her own adult life. He was good, he was kind, he grew into the most beautiful soul in the world. He was the center of my world. I will update his page in the next week, and I know no one will read this, but I also looked in his inbox and saw he was talking to people, he used to tell me about some of the June posts and conversations and it was just so sweet. I started working on pre requisites for PA school last fall, and he was supporting me in every way he could emotionally because he knew how I needed help better than I did. Don't hold back with your loved ones. Take the pictures. Do the things. Make the memories. Love and trust if you know they are the one, I look back at my insecurities now it looks as stupid as he definitely thought they were.
Cats tax as is tradition, they were rescued from a Cask of Almontialldo style fate when slipping through a 3 inch gap in the place between the counter and the board that closed off the below the sink space. Scared the shit out of us but he came to the rescue.
item.dc:creator: nokittythatsabadgoddamnkitty

item.title: If there's something that truly trickles down, and shits hard in most countries in the world is if shit starts in the US.
item.description:
Any bipartisan border bill to be passed by Congress: 1. Kamala Harris must become The President of The United States 2. The Congress must be purged of neo-nazis, fascists, maga acolytes, Trump loyalists, and J6 traitors and apologists. 3. The SCOTUS must be cleared of White Supremacists, fascist enablers, and all the corrupt bribe-receiving judges. 4. Everyone involved must be for bringing solutions to The People and for America as a whole. Otherwise, it will be just the same old musical chairs of lazy & greedy individuals playing with human lives for political gain.
If you read this and haven’t joined already, tag on Team Harris-Walz! Learn more here: https://www.reddit.com/r/KamalaHarris/s/vjEXlQwfIF Be Team Harris-Wals, jump on the train at go.kamalaharris.com/calls/ and https://events.democrats.org/event/725393/, and ALL TO THE VOTE for Democracy. FOCUS IN JOY. When WE VOTE, WE WIN!
The WORSE OF THEM ALL: Peter Thiel and Rupert Murdoch. Democracy-hating folk allergic to peace and prosperity for all. Miserable scumbags who can't have JOY because they are so caught up in their hysterical obsession to rule the world like a cartoonish James Bond Villain. The good thing is that all eventually die in disgrace, like Hitler, Mussolini, Franco, Salazar, Ceaușescu, Stalin, you name it. https://www.tumblr.com/harriswalz2024-2028/765209187822206976/beware-of-jd-vance-he-is-younger-radical-more
20fucking24 and in the US of America, women are dying because they can't have gynecological health care or any health care professional involved can be penalized with life in prison because Alt Right Conservatives can't mind their fucking business and are CRINGELY obsessed in controlling every genitalia as possible starting by the female who they deem inferior. VOTE TO MAKE THEM MIND THEIR FUCKING BUSINESS and leave the rest of us minding our own! #timwalz
#satire #satire_but_just_barely
#storytime, yes, that's me OP ??? I have traveled enough to know that the US Democracy Project MUST be protected at all costs. If there's something that truly trickles down, and shits hard in most countries in the world is if shit starts in the US. Please VOTE, VOTE early, Phone Bank to talk about voting, plan to VOTE, help someone to VOTE
One of the creepiest things about taking care of elderly and sick people is the REGRET, REMORSE, and NO ONE TO TRULY FORGIVE their choices. Especially the ones that could avoid blood to be spilled. I think I’m starting to get too personal here. THIS IS SERIOUS!

item.dc:creator: DumpsterKoala

item.title: An interesting bit of recent science
item.description: https://www.livescience.com/health/genetics/largest-animal-genome-sequenced-and-just-1-chromosome-is-the-size-of-the-entire-human-genome Scientists have sequenced the largest known animal genome — and it's 30 times bigger than the human genome. The genome belongs to the South American lungfish (Lepidosiren paradoxa), a primeval, air-breathing fish that "hops" onto land from the water using weird, limb-like fins. The fish's DNA code expanded dramatically over the past 100 million years of evolutionary history, racking up the equivalent of one human genome every 10 million years, researchers found. The findings could shed light on how genomes expand across the tree of life. Lungfish are sometimes called "living fossils" because they have existed for hundreds of millions of years. They are thought to be the most closely related species to the first tetrapods, the ancestor of all vertebrates. These ancestors likely sprouted limbs and crawled onto land around 370 million years ago during the Devonian period, (419 million to 359 million years ago), Science reported. Previously, scientists sequenced the genomes of other lungfish species, including the Australian lungfish (Neoceratodus forsteri). Next on the list were the African lungfish (Protopterus annectens) and (L. paradoxa), whose genome is twice the size of its air-breathing relatives from other continents. The team described the South American lungfish genome Aug. 14 in the journal Nature. It turns out, these air-breathing fish carry a whopping 91 billion base pairs, or letters, of DNA in their genomes. That's enough letters to fill 100,000 books. Yet only 20,000 genes actually code for proteins, meaning the rest may be mostly junk, the study found. More than 90% of the genetic material was made of transposable elements (TEs), or highly repetitive "jumping" genes that were copied from elsewhere in the genome. The scientists also determined why lungfish genomes expanded so precipitously over the past 100 million years. It turns out that the South American lungfish had key genes that suppress TEs, which organisms may have inherited from viruses long ago. Carrying around so much genetic baggage can be problematic. "​​This must be a huge cost to the animal," Axel Meyer, an evolutionary biologist at the University of Konstanz, told Science Magazine. "All but one of this lungfish's 19 chromosomes is the size of the entire human genome, so it takes a lot of energy to copy that DNA. And the nucleus and cell that encase it must be bigger." On the other hand, the extra DNA can come in handy when animals need to adapt to changing environments, Meyer said. That's because TEs can ramp up or down the expression of genes, allowing for more rapid adaptation. While the lungfish may hold the record for the largest known animal genome, it doesn't contain the largest genome overall. That honor belongs to a weird fern that harbors 160 billion letters in its genome — more than 50 times the letters found in human cells. And this particular lungfish may not be the record holder for the largest animal genome for long. The marbled lungfish (Protopterus aethiopicus) may have a genome 50% bigger than this one, Claus-Peter Stelzer, an evolutionary biologist at the University of Innsbruck in Austria who was not involved in the study, told Science. Of course, the species will need its genome sequenced before that can be confirmed.

item.title: 1 Month Post-Accident Followup
item.description: Well, I finally made it home. House was a bit of a disaster. Healing is progressing nicely according to my doctors, and I should be able to walk again inside a month. Remember to wear a helmet and riding gear. The latter didn't do much to save me from the impact of the car, but it did enough to keep vital juices inside where they belong when I went skidding across the pavement. The helmet did its job, and was sacrificed in the process. It could have been so much worse.

item.dc:creator: wixodax1197

item.title: Rolling into the weekend like
item.description:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hi4pzKvuEQM
BACKSTORY: Candice, April, and I grew up as competitive artistic roller skaters in California. We competed in different age groups but knew of each other. We all skated singles and pairs competed at the world class level in different events. After our competitive careers we migrated into the entertainment industry as skating professionals. When April got a call about the audition for Gold, she called me down and we auditioned. We were still looking for a third skater to fit the “vision” of Hiro and Ryan. We called Candice and asked her to come down. We literally started rehearsing that day in a dance studio and the following evening at my family owned roller rink @nrsk8land, which closed during the pandemic. We took a 4 minute routine which only went forwards! and rehearsed it in sections for a limited number of hours before setting in the dark on a highway in Santa Clarita. And no- it wasn’t swept before hand and sometimes we were hauling ass. And no it wasn’t a green screen lol. We went uphill one way and down hill the other performing the choreography in two sections. We skated from sunset to sunrise. From https://www.instagram.com/appelusa/reel/C-5yjFByUUX/
item.dc:creator: hoopsnek

item.title: Are you ready for Funny Friday? Then let's end the week with some laughs
item.description:
Maybe Padme will let you slay her with your other lightsaber if you just ask, Anakin. Hey there, it's time for another round of Funny Friday, where we try to end the work week on a high note with some humor. As always, in the comments there's a link to some bonus funny content that tends to be a little spicier than what's in the main post, so don't forget to check that out. Now on with the funny!
There's no oath of secrecy more serious or deadly than a girl scout vow.
Crossing this black cat actually was bad luck for him.
The last booze bender
Can't get much emptier than there.
There can be only one... and my money is on Keith.
I feel like he should have been offering an old fashioned alarm clock with it instead of caulk.
I call it reasons for a justifiable homicide.
Grover has gone hardcore in his lessons and I respect it.
I think this thirst trap is an age/autism test. The hornier it makes you, the older and/or more autistic you are.
Good thing he's in the shower, it'll be easy to apply water to that burn.
Straw man is looking thic...
Okay, whoever thought this up needs some kind of award for evil.
What, management really thought we were just pretending?
Original creator is CrackerMilk, show them some love: https://www.youtube.com/@CrackerMilk
Ash's mom has got it going on...
Looks like he's petrified in more than one way...
That has got to be the best pirate I've ever seen!
I'm not sure how it's going to help, but I do what the doctor says!
Okay, this is pretty brilliant. Shut up and take my money!
Ever lose service at the worst time?
Baby got back.
Also, his name is dad.
I didn't forget, I'll use it when I'm ready!
It's the story of Cinderfella now.
You know what you did, Benjamin. You're not getting out that easily.
Okay, I've dealt with a lot of things over the years, but Super Saiyan Karen is where I quit and walk away.
That's not untrue...
Okay, now it's time to use the safe word! Pineapple juice!
The curse of the Were-Cat is a terrible thi- MOVING RED DOT!
Some would argue they always did have a daughter, it just didn't show up on the outside at first.
Vampire bites may suck, but a werewolf bite is life changing.
With a shoutout and support to @mydadisdracula. Support when they're on imgur!
Forget being MC, become NPC.
Sounds about right.
Say it. Let the Dark Side flow through you. (The part of me that loves dad jokes just wishes she asked "What's on your mind" in the first panel)
Since it's Spooky Season, instead of a pseudo cat or dog tax, this time around we have a pseudo spider tax. Happy Friday, have a great weekend!

item.title: It's possible to have nice things.
item.description: Continued from article: Parents can opt to take the maternity grant as a fixed sum of money, but nearly two-thirds choose the box. It comes packed with basic necessities like clothing, bibs, hygiene products, and blankets. The box itself doubles as a baby bed (when fitted with the included foam mattress). Finally, it encourages expectant parents to access educational and health information—a prerequisite for receiving the box.[2] There are other eligibility requirements: a recipient must be over five months pregnant, have had a medical exam before their fourth month of pregnancy, and be covered by the Finnish social security scheme. According to the Kela, the Finnish Government’s social insurance agency, the 2023 baby box will include 38 mostly unbranded products (12 less than last year – due to the rising cost of products) and for the first time, the congratulatory letter outlining parental benefits will be available in the Sami languages, as will the included children’s book.[3] Some Australian state governments have pursued similar schemes—both New South Wales[4] and Victoria[5] have provided “baby bundles” to new parents since 2019—but no unified, federal scheme exists. Other countries have also implemented similar policies: Scotland launched a pilot baby box scheme in 2017,[6] which has expanded to all Scotland.[7] Similar publicly-funded initiatives have been launched in parts of Canada, India and South Africa, often with the aim of reducing infant mortality rates in areas of relatively low socioeconomic status. Reid and Swann stress the need for critical and cultural sensitivity when transplanting the Finnish concept to other contexts: “appropriation of a significant cultural and social tool for infant health and wellbeing risks the material object—the box and its contents—being used to develop western, normative parenting practices whilst maintaining power relations.”[8] They point to the example of Zambia, where the “chitenge”—a multipurpose garment—demonstrates a local solution that is a more appropriate alternative to the baby box. Closer to home, the Wahakura is a woven flax basket used as a traditional infant sleeping place in New Zealand, inspired by the Porakaraka cradles used in Maori families. A six-year pilot program has distributed similar baskets—made of plastic, rather than flax, and referred to as “Pēpi Pods”—to Maori and Pacific communities. Research has found the initiative helped encourage safer infant sleeping while also utilising culturally familiar crafts and materials.[9] There have been calls to introduce similar programs in Australia—most notably in Queensland, where Pēpi Pods are provided to babies with weakened breathing responses.[10] At its core, the Finnish baby box is both symbolic and practical–upholding the principle of equality, while providing basic essentials and encouraging parents to access antenatal services. Source: https://www.nordicpolicycentre.org.au/baby_boxes
item.dc:creator: Drix1942

item.title: Memes and stuff: I don't keep track of how many of these I do edition
item.description:
I do it out of love, and when he gets all smug.
Felt
Cats are connoisseurs.
My partner guffawed at this.
She's gonna get those ugg boots dirty. Those things were a mistake... Most viral edit: there is a pic my partner took of me stretching my back that this pic reminds me of. Not sure if considered nsfw, since I'm fully clothed, except you can see the top of my underwear. I was debating on comparing them in this post. Eh, pic in comments.
Sent to my partner.
I love teasing.
A good half of these are me.
Yes it is
My partner is gender fluid, still prefers he/him but wants to be referred to as my partner for the most part. Maybe because we seem too straight if not. Lol
We were literally talking about the guy on reddit with two fully functioning penises and this popped up.
I built my first pc by doing the same thing.
That's euphoric, no matter if you're trans or not, tbh.
My partner says his twink death happened after high school, he's still pretty cute. What can I say, I prefer a feminine touch.
Guys don't have to deal with cramps because of hormones, they suck...
Ummmm, sent to my partner... I told him as long as I got to do it back to him. We need to get a strap...
Pretty much every week.
I thought this was an exaggeration, but talking to some of my guy friends, you all need new hobbies.
My partner has no interest in learning how to play magic. Good thing my bestie plays. It makes it better when her and I go to card shops and we get a weird vibe from someone.
Bratty sub most of the time, but I can take control if the need requires it.
It's a combo of the 'tism, ADHD, and anxiety that makes me that way...
Sent to my transmasc friend.
Again, to my transmasc friend.
Facts
Started farting in front of my partner after he said I fart in my sleep. I stunk him out of the bedroom the other day.
This was sent to me...
I'd be a fae's pet in an instant.
Never actually tried Baja blast, I was over drinking soda when it came out. I have a soda every great while (mostly as mixers in drinks...), but still no desire to try amy mountain dew flavor.
Lmao
Is me, lol

item.title: I've seen things you'd never believe. Steaming milk swirling into rich, dark espresso. I watched chocolate melt slowly, blending into a perfect mocha, its warmth rising in the cool morning air. All those moments will dissolve into foam, like sugar in the
item.description: Take a break from the stresses of the American election cycle knowing that no matter what happens, the horrors of the world were always going to weather you down to nothing in the end. There is nothing beautiful in this world entropy cannot destroy. Source: https://youtube.com/shorts/WcjJWn3F-4E

item.dc:creator: chairabeth

item.title: Author dedications are an art unto themselves.
item.description: MV Edit - I haven't published a novel yet but I did dedicate a short story to one person after their random act of kindness (https://imgur.com/gallery/im-still-processing-this-one-of-nicest-things-anyones-ever-done-me-64Fsg2i). I think if I *did* do a dedication, I'd include Imgur since it's still one of those die-hard-rascals-with-a-heart-of-gold communities that I used to inhabit since the early 00s. Anyway, if you're interested in being a part of that dedication, here's one of the novel projects I'm working on - https://inkican.com/mike-sierra-echo-middle-grade-scifi-space-novel-portal/ - help me talk to a lit agent that specializes in scifi and middle-grade fiction. Connecting me is cheaper than buying me a pizza - and it would legit change my life and the life of my rescue kitties.
item.dc:creator: inkican
